expectations.evidence: Runs 'python3 ~/scripts/notify.py' which invokes send_notification() via CLI interface
Passes 0 as the third argument for priority
Message is 'This is a test notification to verify your Pushover setup is working correctly.'

expectations.text: Checks for required environment variables before sending
expectations.evidence: First checks PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN are set before sending

expectations.text: Reports success or failure of the notification delivery
expectations.evidence: Reports 'Test notification sent successfully' and provides troubleshooting if not received
